allow: Bash(export PATH="$HOME/bin:$PATH" && gh auth login --web -p https 2>&1)
Bash(export PATH="$HOME/bin:$PATH" && gh repo list Nagi-Inaba --limit 30 2>&1)
Bash(export PATH="$HOME/bin:$PATH" && gh repo clone Nagi-Inaba/claude-code-setup /tmp/claude-code-setup 2>&1)
Bash(export PATH="$HOME/bin:$PATH" && gh repo list Nagi-Inaba --limit 50 2>&1 | grep -i secur)
Bash(export PATH="$HOME/bin:$PATH" && gh api user/starred --paginate --jq '.[].full_name' 2>&1 | grep -i secur)
Bash(export PATH="$HOME/bin:$PATH" && gh search repos "security claude-code" --owner=Nagi-Inaba --json fullName 2>&1; gh search repos "security claude" --json fullName --limit 10 2>&1)
Bash(export PATH="$HOME/bin:$PATH" && gh repo list Nagi-Inaba --limit 50 --json name,description 2>&1)
Bash(export PATH="$HOME/bin:$PATH" && gh api user/repos --paginate --jq '.[] | select\(.owner.login != "Nagi-Inaba"\) | "\\\(.full_name\) - \\\(.description\)"' 2>&1)
Bash(export PATH="$HOME/bin:$PATH" && gh api user/repos --paginate --jq '.[] | select\(.owner.login != "Nagi-Inaba"\) | .full_name + " - " + \(.description // "no description"\)' 2>&1)

Bash(export PATH="$HOME/bin:$PATH" && gh api "/user/repos?affiliation=collaborator&per_page=100" 2>&1 | python3 -c "import sys,json; [print\(r['full_name'], '-', r.get\('description',''\)\) for r in json.loads\(sys.stdin.read\(\)\)]" 2>&1 || gh api "/user/repos?affiliation=collaborator&per_page=100" --jq ".[].full_name" 2>&1)
Bash(export PATH="$HOME/bin:$PATH" && gh repo clone Nagi-ip/claude-security-module /tmp/claude-security-module 2>&1)
